meta.title: TV DocX Viewer – Word Document Viewer for Android TV
meta.description: Read and manage Word documents on your Android TV with ease. Import DOCX files via USB, web, Wi-Fi, or FTP and enjoy a full-featured viewer with zoom, night mode, bookmarks, and search.
meta.keywords: Android TV DOCX viewer, Word document viewer Android TV, DOCX reader TV, Android TV document app, USB DOCX viewer, import Word file Android TV
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: TV DocX Viewer for Android TV
og.description: Read Word documents on your Android TV. Import DOCX files via USB, web, Wi-Fi, or FTP with a remote-friendly 10-foot UI.

twitter.title: TV DocX Viewer for Android TV
twitter.description: A full-featured Word document viewer for Android TV. Import, read, and manage DOCX files right on your big screen.

product.name: TV DocX Viewer
product.heroTitle: TV DocX Viewer – Read Word Documents on Your Android TV
product.heroDescription: Open and read DOCX files right on your big screen. Import documents from USB, web, Wi-Fi, or FTP and enjoy a full-featured viewer built for remote control navigation.

cards.title: USB & File Browser
bullets: Auto-scans USB drives for DOCX files
Thumbnail + filename listing for easy browsing
Long-press OK to view file info (name, location, size, date)
Open or delete files directly from the info dialog

cards.title: Easy DOCX Import
bullets: Web import using secure token — no shared network needed
Wi-Fi import for faster transfers on the same network
FTP import using anonymous connection
QR codes on web and FTP pages for quick connection

cards.title: Full-Featured DOCX Viewer
bullets: Remembers last viewed page, zoom level, orientation, and night mode
Zoom in/out with horizontal scroll support when zoomed
Go to any specific page number instantly
Search text within the DOCX file
Night mode toggle for comfortable reading

cards.title: Bookmark Management
bullets: Bookmark any page while reading
View all bookmarks across all documents in one place
Bookmark list shows page thumbnail, page number, and document title
Long-press to delete bookmarks from the listing page

cards.title: App Settings & Storage
bullets: View screen resolution, storage info, file count, and memory usage
Clear imported DOCX files, thumbnails, or bookmarks easily
Reload/rescan USB drive and imports folder anytime

cards.title: More Built-In Pages
bullets: Help/FAQ page with detailed answers to common questions
Support & feedback page with QR codes for quick access
About Us, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use pages included
Version info accessible directly from the menu

items.title: Students & Learners
items.text: Read study notes, assignments, and documents on a large screen without squinting at a small device.

items.title: Professionals
items.text: Review reports, drafts, and work documents comfortably from your couch using just a remote control.

items.title: Offices & Meeting Rooms
items.text: Display Word documents on a shared TV screen for presentations or group review sessions.

items.title: Readers & Book Lovers
items.text: Enjoy long-form reading — novels, manuals, or eBooks saved as DOCX — on your big screen TV.

items.q: How do I import DOCX files into the app?
items.a: You can import DOCX files via web upload using a secure token (no shared network needed), Wi-Fi upload when on the same network, or FTP upload. QR codes are provided for quick access.

items.q: Can the app read files from a USB drive?
items.a: Yes. TV DocX Viewer automatically scans connected USB drives and lists all DOCX files for you to open directly.

items.q: Does the app remember where I left off?
items.a: Yes. The viewer remembers your last viewed page, zoom level, orientation, and night mode setting for each document.

items.q: Can I search text inside a document?
items.a: Yes. Use the Search option in the document options menu to find any text within the open DOCX file.

items.q: Is the app free to use?
items.a: TV DocX Viewer is free to download with core features available. A subscription unlocks premium features for an enhanced reading experience.

video.title: See TV DocX Viewer in Action

steps.title: Install the App
steps.text: Download TV DocX Viewer from Google Play on your Android TV.

steps.title: Import Your Documents
steps.text: Connect a USB drive or import DOCX files via web, Wi-Fi, or FTP — whichever is most convenient.

steps.title: Start Reading
steps.text: Select any document from the list and start reading with full zoom, search, and bookmark support.

cards.title: Made for TV
bullets: Optimized for remote control navigation
Clean 10-foot UI experience

cards.title: Private & Offline
bullets: Documents stay locally on your TV
No cloud sync or internet required to read

cards.title: Powerful Reader

Picks up right where you left off

items.title: Students & Learners
items.text: Read study materials and documents on a large screen without straining your eyes.

items.title: Professionals
items.text: Review work documents and reports comfortably from your couch.

items.title: Offices & Meeting Rooms
items.text: Display Word documents on a shared TV for group review or presentations.

items.title: Readers & Book Lovers
items.text: Enjoy long-form DOCX content on your big screen with full reading controls.

items.q: How do I import DOCX files into TV DocX Viewer?
items.a: You can import files using web upload with a secure token, Wi-Fi upload when on the same network, or FTP upload. QR codes make connecting quick and easy.

items.q: Can I read files from a USB drive?
items.a: Yes. The app automatically scans connected USB drives and lists all DOCX files for direct access.

items.q: Does it remember my reading position?
items.a: Yes. TV DocX Viewer remembers your last viewed page, zoom level, orientation, and night mode setting per document.

items.q: Do I need an internet connection to read documents?
items.a: No. Once your documents are imported or accessed from USB, you can read them fully offline.
The app is free to download. A subscription is available to unlock premium reading features.
